children.heading: Applications
children.label: a Applications
children.text: An eligible local educational agency, or consortium of such agencies, desiring to receive a grant under this part shall submit an application to the Secretary at such time, in such manner, and containing such information and assurances as the Secretary may reasonably require.

children.label: A
children.text: how a grant awarded under this part will be used to promote desegregation, including any available evidence on, or if such evidence is not available, a rationale, based on current research, for how the proposed magnet school programs will increase interaction among students of different social, economic, ethnic, and racial backgrounds;

children.label: B
children.text: the manner and extent to which the magnet school program will increase student academic achievement in the instructional area or areas offered by the school, including any evidence, or if such evidence is not available, a rationale based on current research findings, to support such description;

children.label: C
children.text: how the applicant will continue the magnet school program after assistance under this part is no longer available, and, if applicable, an explanation of why magnet schools established or supported by the applicant with grant funds under this part cannot be continued without the use of grant funds under this part;

children.label: D
children.text: how the applicant will assess, monitor, and evaluate the impact of the activities funded under this part on student achievement and integration;

children.label: i
children.text: to improve student academic achievement for all students attending the magnet school programs; and

children.label: ii
children.text: to implement services and activities that are consistent with other programs under this chapter, and other Acts, as appropriate; and

children.label: F
children.text: the criteria to be used in selecting students to attend the proposed magnet school program; and

children.label: A
children.text: use grant funds under this part for the purposes specified in ;section 7231(b) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: employ effective teachers in the courses of instruction assisted under this part;

children.label: i
children.text: the hiring, promotion, or assignment of employees of the applicant or other personnel for whom the applicant has any administrative responsibility;

children.label: ii
children.text: the assignment of students to schools, or to courses of instruction within the schools, of such applicant, except to carry out the approved plan; and

children.label: iii
children.text: designing or operating extracurricular activities for students;

children.label: D
children.text: carry out a high-quality education program that will encourage greater parental decisionmaking and involvement; and

children.label: E
children.text: give students residing in the local attendance area of the proposed magnet school program equitable consideration for placement in the program, consistent with desegregation guidelines and the capacity of the applicant to accommodate the students.

children.heading: Special rule
children.label: c Special rule
children.text: No grant shall be awarded under this part unless the Assistant Secretary of Education for Civil Rights determines that the assurances described in subsection (b)(2)(C) will be met.
